name: Gallery page filters items by photo/video type and opens the lightbox
description: Verifies the /galeri filter buttons (Tümü / Fotoğraflar / Videolar) change which grid items are shown, and clicking a grid item opens the lightbox viewer.

planSteps.description: The heading 'Gerçek Araçlar. Gerçek Uyum.' is visible and the gallery grid shows multiple items
Only photo items remain in the grid (no video play-icon overlays are visible), and the 'Fotoğraflar' button is now visually highlighted as active
Click the first item in the filtered gallery grid
A fullscreen lightbox overlay opens showing the enlarged image
